Subject: Inquiry About Your Schedule

Dear Gallery Team,

I am writing to ask about your schedule for the coming months. Could you provide more information on the upcoming exhibitions you have planned? We would love to support and attend these events.

Please let us know the ticket prices and opening hours for the upcoming exhibitions so we can plan accordingly. Thank you, and we look forward to seeing the new pieces in the upcoming exhibitions.

Sincerely,

User Name<|im_end|>
